# Lembas

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Item.*

---

Play only if you control a **_Noldor_** or **_Silvan_** hero.
Attach to a hero.
**Action:** Discard Lembas to ready attached hero and heal 3 damage from it.
